title: Link Makes the Ultimate Sacrifice (nintendobrad's account is closed)
description:
nintendobrad's original description:
George Volcano tries to convince Alan to try his new Handsome Hydrating Turd Water. Does he succeed?


Meanwhile, King Harkinan orders Link to beat-up everyone, then eat their corpses. But Link finds that his greatest enemy was always his greatest ally, thus a tragic series of events come to fruition.

This Poop turned out great. Seriously! You're gonna laugh hard, guaranteed.


And special thanks to Randomizer742 for helping me find the F-Zero clip.
